## What this PR does

<!-- e.g. "Adds reproduction log entries for lessons 01-04" -->

## Checklist (reproduction-log PRs)

- [ ] I ran every command in the lesson(s) myself, in order, in PowerShell on Windows.
- [ ] My printed output matched the *Expected output* blocks (metrics within the usual last-decimal wobble).
- [ ] I only added Reproduction Log line(s) — no other files or lines changed.
- [ ] My log line(s) follow the format: `+ Results reproduced by [@username](https://github.com/username) on YYYY-MM-DD (commit [abc1234](https://github.com/abubinfahd/ml-foundations/commit/<full-hash>))`, and the commit is on `master`.
- [ ] This is a single consolidated PR (not one PR per lesson).

## Checklist (fix/improvement PRs)

- [ ] This PR contains no reproduction-log lines (those go in a separate PR).
- [ ] If script output changed, I updated the *Expected output* blocks in the affected docs
      **and** the matching `tests/expected/*.txt` fixture.

## Environment (reproduction-log PRs)

- OS: Windows 10 / 11
- Environment & configuration (Python version, venv, anything unusual):

- Success: <!-- e.g. "Everything worked, all outputs matched" -->
